content.title: Multi-Agent Architecture

speaker.name: Hamza Farooq
speaker.title: Founder & CEO
speaker.bio: AI Startup founder, educator, and practitioner with years of experience in cutting-edge AI development.

content.overview: This 2-hour workshop provides a practical blueprint for building multi-agent ecosystems using A2A communication, MCP, and Google's ADK as a system design framework.
whoShouldNotAttend: Complete beginners with no coding experience
Those looking for a non-technical overview
Anyone expecting pre-built solutions without hands-on work
